_doc: AERO is 100.00% unlocked per defillama.com/unlocks/aerodrome. Forward supply growth comes from emissions (Gauge Emissions 84.33%, Rebase 7.49%, Team Emissions 4.76%), not editorial unlocks. Notes: 'After Epoch 67, emissions are controlled by the Aero Fed where veAERO voters decide.' 'Gauge, Rebase and Team Emissions are tracked onchain.' Setting events: [] — emissions handled at runtime if/when an on-chain emissions feed is wired.
